3.variants.0.subtitle: "Feeling restless..."
3.variants.1.subtitle: "The body craves a thrill..."
3.variants.2.subtitle: "Losing control...!"
4.subtitle: "Uwoooo...!"
4.description: Warped into a desire-crazed Beast!  Excitement Level::\c[18]???%\c[0]
5.subtitle: "Poison has infected your body"
6.subtitle: "The bleeding won't stop"
6.description: Takes damage based on max HP!
7.subtitle: "Look, he got struck by lightning!"
8.subtitle: "Hot, hot, hot, hot—!"
8.description: Applies continuous burning to all units in range!
9.subtitle: "Turn into an ice pop!"
11.subtitle: "Dizzy and disoriented!"
13.subtitle: "Fufu, this is what you get for defying me~♥"
14.subtitle: "It’s so hot..."
15.subtitle: "In the eyes of monsters, you’re just a pitiful, ugly little preemie…"
15.description: Disguised as a monster – monsters won’t actively attack you!
16.subtitle: "You can’t even play such a simple game? What a ZAKO~"
16.description: Certified as a ZAKO for cheating!
28.subtitle: Gaming \str[120]
28.variants.0.description:
She’s really focused on the game, 
Best not to bother her too much...
28.variants.1.description:
She’s still playing...
Should I tease her a bit?
29.subtitle: Bathing \str[120]
29.variants.0.description:
\str[120]’s in the bath— I can
vaguely make out her silhouette
29.variants.1.description:
\str[120] is drying her hair 
with a towel
30.subtitle: Resting \str[120]
30.variants.0.description:
\str[120] looks very happy,
Anything interesting happen?
30.variants.1.description:
\str[120] is getting cuter
Maybe give her a pats!
30.variants.2.description:
\str[120] is just sitting
there. Try talking to her…
30.variants.3.description:
\str[120] looks a bit sad
Maybe try comforting her?
30.variants.4.description:
\str[120] seems a bit off
Wonder what could be done…
30.variants.5.description:
\str[120] looks sleepy
Maybe it's time for bed?
31.subtitle: Sleeping \str[120]
31.variants.0.description:
Asleep like a plant…
unable to be roused…
31.variants.1.description:
Deep asleep…
It seems hard to wake her
31.variants.2.description:
Sleeping soundly,
completely immersed in her dreams…
31.variants.3.description:
Her eyelashes twitch
as if murmuring in a dream
31.variants.5.description:
\str[120] is almost awake
but her senses are still hazy
31.variants.6.description:
Defenseless in sleep, lost in 
last night's blissful exhaustion
32.subtitle: Hungry \str[120]
32.variants.1.description:
\str[120] seems a bit worried
about the dinner taste…
32.variants.2.description:
\str[120] looks like 
she wants to help
33.subtitle: Relaxing \str[120]
33.variants.0.description:
\str[120]’s licking her popsicle…
looks way too defenseless...
34.subtitle: Brushing \str[120]
34.variants.0.description:
\str[120]’s lazily brushing her teeth
still looking half-asleep...
35.description:
✦(Feels like body is 
becoming so light...)
40.subtitle: Crying \str[120]
42.subtitle: \str[120] watching TV
42.variants.0.description:
\str[120] curls up like a kitten, 
sneaking glances at me.
42.variants.1.description:
She pressed close to mine, 
like holding a warm pillow.
43.subtitle: Frightened \str[120]
43.variants.0.description:
\str[120] clung tightly to me,
her body trembling slightly…
43.variants.1.description:
Our bodies were completely entwined, 
exchanging warmth with each other…
45.subtitle: "I promised my dear sister, so I have to keep it"
46.subtitle: "I promised my dear sister, so I have to keep it"
54.subtitle: "rustle... rustle..."
54.description: You are being closely watched by a group of small creatures...
55.subtitle: "This is my domain, so no mischief allowed~♥"
55.description: Attack prohibited! Nearby monsters are filled with fear!
57.subtitle: "I feel like I can do anything right now"
57.description: Kenja Mode activated, all stats increased
58.subtitle: "Ate something bad..."
59.description: ...Forgot something important? Maybe it’ll come back later.
61.subtitle: "My ass is on fire..."
61.description: Can't run or dash due to butt pain!
62.description: Focuses for the next strike, movement speed reduced
63.subtitle: "Triple speed of True Red"
67.description: Floating on the water. Movement slowed, can’t attack!
71.subtitle: "Ate something delicious—warm and cozy inside~"
71.description: Recovers a small amount of health every second
72.subtitle: "Power... surging through me!"
73.subtitle: "I'm starting to understand everything"
74.subtitle: "Can you keep up... with my SPEED?!"
75.subtitle: "Divine Weapon Descent"
77.subtitle: "Flame of Rebirth"
77.description: Allows one revival while the effect is active
78.subtitle: "Twist of Fate..."
78.description: Blessed by fate—good things are more likely to happen!
79.subtitle: "Twist of Fate..."
79.description: Blessed by fate—sad things are more likely to happen!
80.subtitle: "Triple speed of True Red"
85.subtitle: "But it really tastes awful..."
86.subtitle: "SKILL ISSUE"
86.description: You’ve been mercilessly taunted! Defense and luck greatly decreased!
90.subtitle: 「Don’t face-check the bush, you fool!?」
90.description: Being in the bush feels safe… HP auto-regenerates
98.subtitle: "It feels like my sister is right beside me..."
99.subtitle: "We are the guardians!"
101.subtitle: "LOOK INTO MY EVIL EYEZ SEE SOMETHIN' INSIDE!"
104.subtitle: "You radiate glory!"
105.subtitle: "Share this blessing with thee"
106.subtitle: "I... I can't lift it..."
106.description: Not enough strength to use the weapon fully!
107.subtitle: "We are the guardians!"
108.subtitle: "We are the guardians!"
109.subtitle: "We are the guardians!"
110.subtitle: "We are the guardians!"
115.subtitle: "The immortal scarecrow's heart, yet decay is fate"
116.subtitle: "Endless greed has found you—"
116.description: Drop held money when taking damage!
117.subtitle: "Thus shall you gain the world's glory, and all darkness shall flee"
122.subtitle: "Heh heh I'll survive, I swear it"
